query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed my research on Magnificent 7 large M&A activity in 2026. Here's the summary of findings:

## Key Findings: Mag 7 $10B+ Deals in 2026

**Pending mega-deal as of June–July 2026:**
- **Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.6B)** — Announced April 14, 2026; $90/share cash-and-stock. Definitive merger agreement signed, **pending regulatory review** (FCC). This is the clearest example of a live/pending Mag 7 mega-deal at the mid-2026 mark. Boosts Amazon's Project Leo satellite business vs. Starlink.

**Largest Mag 7 transaction:**
- **Nvidia–Groq (~$20B)** — Announced Dec 24, 2025; Nvidia's largest deal on record, but structured as a strategic licensing agreement + acqui-hire rather than a formal acquisition. Faced a Senate inquiry (Warren/Blumenthal) in March 2026.

**Large deal closed early 2026:**
- **Alphabet–Wiz ($32B)** — Closed March 11, 2026; largest acquisition in Alphabet's history (cloud security).

**Notable non-$10B M&A / non-acquisitions / rumors:**
- Meta–Nebius $27B (a five-year *compute supply* deal, not an acquisition)
- Meta–Manus ~$2B (blocked by China)
- Apple–Q.ai ~$2B (closed Jan 2026, Apple's 2nd-biggest ever)
- **Apple–Perplexity ~$14B — the most prominent *rumored* mega-deal, but reportedly abandoned**
- Tesla–unnamed AI hardware firm up to $2B; Tesla/SpaceX merger merely floated by Musk
- **Microsoft — no $10B+ deal in 2026**

**Bottom line:** The one genuinely pending Mag 7 deal ≥$10B as of June–July 2026 is Amazon–Globalstar. No new $10B+ acquisition was announced by Apple, Microsoft, Meta, or Tesla in 2026, and the widely-discussed Apple–Perplexity deal did not proceed. The full structured findings (key facts, 16 sources, and 12 quantitative data points) have been submitted.

sources.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business in deal worth about $11.6 billion
sources.snippet: Amazon said Tuesday it would acquire Globalstar for $90 a share, in a deal worth about $11.57 billion.

sources.snippet: Announced entry into definitive merger agreement with Amazon; Agreement and Plan of Merger regulatory; received further regulatory clarity from FCC.

sources.title: Nvidia buying AI chip startup Groq's assets for about $20 billion in its largest deal on record
sources.snippet: Nvidia has agreed to buy assets from Groq for $20 billion in cash.

sources.snippet: Deal structured as licensing and acqui-hire.

sources.snippet: Google announced it has closed the acquisition of Wiz; deal initially announced in March 2025.

sources.snippet: Meta has signed a new long-term agreement to spend up to $27 billion on Nebius' AI infrastructure over five years ($12B dedicated capacity).

sources.snippet: Apple is exploring the acquisition of Perplexity AI in a deal reportedly valued at around $14 billion.

sources.snippet: Reports suggest Apple shifted focus from search startups to partnerships and other acquisitions.

sources.snippet: Tesla agreed to acquire an unnamed AI hardware company for up to $2 billion in stock and equity awards (Q1 2026 10-Q).

sources.title: Global M&A reaches record highs as mega-deals reshape corporate landscape
sources.snippet: LSEG data showed announced transactions totalled $2.8 trillion in H1 2026, a 48% increase YoY.

sources.title: Big Tech And AI Power Record $10B+ M&A Deal Surge To Start 2026
sources.snippet: Q1 2026 transactions exceeded $1.2 trillion; four of the six biggest deals were AI-race companies.

key_facts: Amazon agreed to acquire Globalstar for ~$11.57 billion ($90/share, cash-and-stock, 23.5% premium), announced April 14, 2026; deal was PENDING regulatory review as of Q1 2026 filing — the clearest pending Mag 7 mega-deal as of mid-2026.

Nvidia's ~$20 billion Groq deal (announced Dec 24, 2025) is Nvidia's largest transaction on record but is structured as a strategic licensing agreement plus acqui-hire rather than a formal acquisition; drew a US Senate inquiry (Warren/Blumenthal) on March 20, 2026.
Alphabet closed its $32 billion all-cash acquisition of cloud-security firm Wiz on March 11, 2026 — the largest acquisition in Alphabet's history (announced March 2025).
Meta signed a $27 billion, five-year AI infrastructure supply deal with Nebius on March 16, 2026 — this is a compute-capacity agreement, NOT an acquisition.
Apple's rumored ~$14 billion acquisition of Perplexity AI (discussed since mid-2025) did NOT proceed; 2026 reports indicate the deal was abandoned in favor of partnerships and smaller targets.
Apple's largest actual 2026 deal was Q.ai (~$1.6-2 billion, closed ~Jan 29, 2026), its second-biggest acquisition ever after Beats ($3B, 2014).
Meta's ~$2 billion acquisition of AI agent startup Manus was blocked/ordered unwound by the Chinese government on April 27, 2026.
Tesla disclosed an agreement to acquire an unnamed AI hardware company for up to $2 billion (stock/equity) in its Q1 2026 10-Q (April 2026); suspected target is DensityAI.
Microsoft announced NO $10B+ acquisition in 2026; only small deals such as Osmos (Jan 2026). Its last billion-dollar+ deals were Activision Blizzard (2022) and Nuance (2021).
Elon Musk reportedly floated a Tesla-SpaceX merger in May-June 2026 (combined value ~$3.4 trillion); this is speculative and not a formal deal.
Global M&A hit a record ~$2.8 trillion in announced deals in H1 2026, up 48% year-over-year (LSEG data); 2026 described as a record year for AI-driven deals.

data_points.metric: Meta-Nebius AI infrastructure deal (not an acquisition)
Apple-Perplexity rumored deal value (did not proceed)
Tesla unnamed AI hardware company acquisition (up to)
